text: Which one of the given requirements regarding the manning and supervision of survival craft corresponds to Solas regulations?

options.text: Any crew member can command a survival craft
A deck officer or certificated person shall be placed in charge of each survival craft to be used
Only the Chief Cook can manage survival craft
Lifeboats don't require any assigned person-in-charge

explanation: SOLAS Chapter III stipulates that for every survival craft, a certificated person or deck officer must be placed in charge to ensure orderly launching, navigation, and coordination of the survivors.
